tasks.dependencies: Fetches the list of Returns endpoints/accounts/vendors to map over

tasks.task_type: PythonOperator.expand (dynamic task mapping, exponential backoff retries)
tasks.dependencies: One mapped instance per endpoint; retry policy is error-code-aware
Aggregates success/failure/retry counts across mapped instances
Evaluates aggregate retry/error rate against a storm threshold
Branch: retry rate within normal bounds
Branch: retry storm detected, trips circuit breaker for downstream calls
Pages on-call, attaches AutoRCA retry-storm analysis
Loads Returns target with successfully retrieved records

operator_config.sql: SELECT 1 AS autorca_probe, 'RTL_RET_RETRY' AS dag_id, 'load_target' AS task_name;

incident.description: Retry Storm incident on the Returns pipeline (RTL_RET_RETRY): finance bank-feed reconciliation retry storm.
incident.symptoms: The daily bank-feed API pull, mapped across 12 regional bank accounts, generated 340 retries concentrated on 2 of the 12 accounts.
incident.root_cause: Two regional bank accounts' API credentials were mid-rotation by the treasury team without coordinating with the data engineering team, causing consistent 403s that were retried as if transient.
incident.business_impact: Cash position reconciliation incomplete for 2 regions, requiring manual bank portal lookups by the treasury team to close the day.
incident.resolution: Coordinate credential rotation via a shared change calendar; add a 403-specific fail-fast path (max 1 retry) distinct from network-transient error handling.

expected_rca.expected_rca_summary: AI AutoRCA should identify: Two regional bank accounts' API credentials were mid-rotation by the treasury team without coordinating with the data engineering team, causing consistent 403s that were retried as if transient.
expected_rca.evidence_required: Airflow task logs, Datadog infrastructure/application metrics, JIRA/Confluence RAG context for known-issue matching
expected_rca.airflow_logs: Airflow retry log shows consistent, non-decreasing error pattern typical of a credential (not network) issue
expected_rca.datadog_metrics: Datadog shows 403 errors isolated to exactly 2 of 12 mapped task instances, correlated with treasury's change-ticket timestamp
expected_rca.resolution: Coordinate credential rotation via a shared change calendar; add a 403-specific fail-fast path (max 1 retry) distinct from network-transient error handling.
expected_rca.preventive_action: Require any credential-rotation change to be logged against the metadata model's connection registry, triggering an automatic DAG-owner notification before rotation.
